column2: SO-DIMM stands for {{c1::Small Outline Dual In-line Memory Module}}.
column3: SO-DIMM is the compact removable memory-module form factor commonly used in laptops.
column4:
Memory Trick

“Small Outline” distinguishes the compact module from the larger desktop DIMM form factor.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.1; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 1.1
column9: A+::220-1201::1.1 A+::220-1201::LaptopHardware Cloze HighYield Memory Acronym

column2: Li-ion and LiPo laptop batteries do not develop the {{c1::memory effect}} associated with older battery technologies.
column3: Routine charging does not progressively reduce their capacity through memory effect.
column4:
Exam Trap

Do not apply a full-discharge routine from older battery technologies solely to prevent memory effect in Li-ion or LiPo batteries.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.1; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 1.1
column9: A+::220-1201::1.1 A+::220-1201::LaptopHardware Cloze HighYield Battery Chemistry

column2: In the supported laptop-storage context, an M.2 drive connects directly to its socket without separate {{c1::data and power cables}}.
column3: This describes the physical connection used by the source; it does not assign every M.2 drive to one storage protocol.
column4:
Exam Trap

M.2 removes separate drive cables, but the laptop design still determines how much disassembly is required for access.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.1; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 1.1

column2: Bluetooth commonly provides short-range {{c1::personal area network (PAN)}} connectivity for nearby devices and peripherals.
column3: This role differs from Wi-Fi local-area networking and NFC's much shorter interaction range.
column4:
Why

The PAN label helps connect Bluetooth's short range with its common peripheral use.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.2; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 1.1

column2: Near-field communication (NFC) operates over a distance of about {{c1::4 centimeters or less}}.
column3: NFC can support short-range data transfer or authentication interactions.
column4:
Memory Trick

Think “tap distance,” not room-scale wireless connectivity.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.2; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 1.1
